DEV.description: Put any phone numbers you want to be bot owner without + or spaces "," Ex: 254114283550,254768792955

HEROKU_API.description: Put a Heroku api key here, will be required to update bot in your Dm

SESSION.description: Paste your Session id here, as it is required for authenticationn.

APP_NAME.description: Input your app name that you put above, Must be in small letters.
